subcodes.first_line: The events of your travels and gatherings are known and recorded in the presence of the Throne. Verily, He is the Truth, the Knower of things unseen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: وقایع شما سفرا و حضرا لدی العرش معلوم و مذکور انه لهو الحق علام الغیوب انا
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @unity; oneness of humanity
